title: juncus pseudostygius
intro: Juncus pseudostygius, also known as the yellow rush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Juncaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, with reported medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Juncus pseudostygius are said to include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and can also be used in tinctures and topical applications, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
